title: Norwegian Celeriac Gratin
description: A creamy, rich side dish with a deep, earthy flavor from the celeriac. Perfect for a chilly winter evening.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the intensely garlicky butter over low heat.
Add the flour and whisk to form a smooth paste.
Slowly add the heavy cream, whisking constantly.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the grated cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of celeriac slices.
Pour some of the cheese sauce over the celeriac, then repeat the layers until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of cheese sauce.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the celeriac is tender.
